headline: Talen Energy Appoints New General Counsel Amid Leadership Transition (TLN)
summary: The leadership change places former Vistra executive Daniel Kelly in charge of Talen’s legal and regulatory functions as the company continues positioning itself around power infrastructure and AI-driven energy demand growth. Key Investor TakeawaysTalen Energy (NASDAQ:TLN) appointed Daniel Kelly as General Counsel and Corporate Secretary following the retirement of longtime legal executive John Wander.
